name: Iso11783IL_SetWSMAddr
title: Iso11783IL_SetWSMAddr
description: Use this function to set the address of the Working Set Master, if this ECU is a member of a working set. All parameter groups which are addressed to the Working Set Master are also received by an ECU which calls this function.

parameters.name: wsmAddress
parameters.description: Address of the Working Set Master for this ECU.
